name: autodesk-fusion
description: High-autonomy, evidence-driven Codex plugin for Autodesk Fusion API development, Fusion Desktop MCP, Product Help MCP, Fusion Data MCP, APS Automation, runtime doctor checks, API-reference RAG, evidence ledgers, Insider compatibility, and CAD automation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Autonomous, evidence-driven Fusion API, MCP, APS, and CAD workflows.
interface.longDescription: Use Codex as a high-autonomy Autodesk Fusion developer with runtime doctor checks, official Fusion API reference retrieval, live Desktop MCP operation, Fusion Data MCP/MFGDM workflows, evidence ledgers, Computer Use UI guidance, optional hooks, subagents, and verification-first CAD automation.
defaultPrompt: Use Autodesk Fusion Developer autonomously: run the Fusion runtime doctor, research official sources, implement the requested change, and record evidence.
Use Autodesk Fusion Developer to inspect the active Fusion design through MCP, execute changes within my requested scope, and verify the result with an evidence ledger.
Use Autodesk Fusion Developer to query the local Fusion API reference before writing API code, then test and summarize exact sources used.
Use Autodesk Fusion Developer with subagents for API research, implementation, runtime verification, and release audit when the task is large.
